sentences.sentence: Once again, southern Africa is facing a severe food crisis.
sentences.translation: 南部非洲再次面临严重的粮食危机。

structure.text: southern Africa
is facing a severe food crisis

difficult_points: is facing 用现在进行时强调正在发生的危机。
Once again 表明此类危机反复出现。

sentences.sentence: It is a chronic problem - and shouldn't be.
sentences.translation: 这是一个长期问题——而它本不该存在。

structure.text: It is a chronic problem
and shouldn't be

difficult_points: It 回指粮食危机。
shouldn't be 省略了 a chronic problem，表达批评。

sentences.sentence: At the Trinity hospital in Malawi's southern Nsanje district, three-year-old Mboyi is lying listless, his face against the wall.
sentences.translation: 在马拉维南部恩桑杰区的三一医院，三岁的姆博伊无精打采地躺着，脸贴着墙。

structure.text: three-year-old Mboyi is lying listless
his face against the wall

difficult_points: listless 作主语补足语，描述孩子虚弱无力。
his face against the wall 是省略 being 的独立主格。

sentences.sentence: His belly is badly bloated and skin is peeling off his legs.
sentences.translation: 他的腹部严重肿胀，腿上的皮肤正在脱落。

structure.text: His belly is badly bloated
and skin is peeling off his legs

difficult_points: and 连接两个并列症状。
is peeling off 用进行时描述皮肤正在脱落。

sentences.sentence: His mother explains that the family has not been able to harvest anything this year, due to poor rains.
sentences.translation: 他的母亲解释说，由于降雨不足，这家人今年什么也没收成。

structure.text: His mother explains
that the family has not been able to harvest anything this year
due to poor rains

difficult_points: that 引导 explains 的宾语从句。
has not been able to 表示截至目前一直无法收获。

sentences.sentence: Mothers in the area are already bringing malnourished children to hospitals in alarming numbers.
sentences.translation: 当地母亲已经成批把营养不良的孩子送往医院，数量令人担忧。

structure.text: Mothers in the area
are already bringing malnourished children to hospitals in alarming numbers

difficult_points: are bringing 强调这一趋势正在持续。
in alarming numbers 表示数量之多已令人警觉。

sentences.sentence: Yet, it will be another six months before the next harvest.
sentences.translation: 然而，距离下一次收获还要六个月。

structure.text: it will be another six months
before the next harvest

difficult_points: it 是时间句型中的形式主语。
before 表示还需等待多久才到下一次收获。

sentences.sentence: Aid agencies are sounding the alarm, hoping that help will come before emaciated children's haunting images, such as those recently seen in Niger, appear on western television screens.
sentences.translation: 援助机构正在发出警报，希望救援能在瘦弱儿童的惊心画面登上西方电视屏幕之前到来，就像最近尼日尔出现的那些画面一样。

structure.text: Aid agencies are sounding the alarm
hoping that help will come
before emaciated children's haunting images, such as those recently seen in Niger, appear on western television screens

difficult_points: hoping 的逻辑主语是 Aid agencies，that 从句作其宾语。
those 代替 images，seen in Niger 是过去分词修饰语。

sentences.sentence: The UN's World Food Programme (WFP) says that close to 12 million people across southern Africa will need food aid before the next harvest.
sentences.translation: 联合国世界粮食计划署表示，下一次收获前，南部非洲近1200万人需要粮食援助。

structure.text: The UN's World Food Programme (WFP) says
that close to 12 million people across southern Africa will need food aid before the next harvest

difficult_points: that 引导 says 的宾语从句。
close to 表示数量接近但不到1200万。

sentences.sentence: The agency is short of more than $150 million to feed them over the next six months.
sentences.translation: 该机构缺少逾1.5亿美元，无法满足他们未来六个月的食物需求。

structure.text: The agency is short of more than $150 million
to feed them over the next six months

difficult_points: The agency 回指世界粮食计划署。
to feed 表示这笔资金的用途，them 指需要援助的人。

sentences.sentence: Malawi and Zimbabwe are by far the hungriest, but Mozambique, Zambia, Lesotho, and Swaziland are also affected.
sentences.translation: 马拉维和津巴布韦的饥荒最为严重，但莫桑比克、赞比亚、莱索托和斯威士兰也受到影响。

structure.text: Malawi and Zimbabwe are by far the hungriest
but Mozambique, Zambia, Lesotho, and Swaziland are also affected

difficult_points: by far 加强最高级 the hungriest。
are affected 是被动语态，表示也受旱灾影响。

sentences.sentence: The drought may be southern Africa's worst in a decade.
sentences.translation: 这场干旱可能是南部非洲十年来最严重的一次。

structure.text: The drought
may be southern Africa's worst in a decade

difficult_points: may 表示推测而非确定结论。
worst 后省略 drought，in a decade 限定比较范围。

sentences.sentence: The crucial rains of January, when newly planted crops need water, did not come on time.
sentences.translation: 一月本应到来的关键降雨未能按时出现，而此时新种下的作物正需要水。

structure.text: The crucial rains of January
when newly planted crops need water
did not come on time

difficult_points: when 指代 January，补充说明这个月份对作物的重要性。
newly planted 是过去分词短语，修饰 crops。

sentences.sentence: Nor, in some places, did seeds and fertiliser.
sentences.translation: 在一些地方，种子和化肥也没有按时到位。

structure.text: Nor
did seeds and fertiliser

difficult_points: Nor 置于句首触发部分倒装。
did 后省略 come on time，承接上一句。

sentences.sentence: Maize, the staple food, is scarce in some areas; prices in markets have shot up beyond the means of the hungriest.
sentences.translation: 作为主食的玉米在一些地区短缺；市场价格已飞涨到最饥饿人群无力承担的程度。

structure.text: Maize, the staple food, is scarce in some areas
prices in markets have shot up beyond the means of the hungriest

difficult_points: the staple food 是 Maize 的同位语。
beyond the means of 表示价格超出某群体的支付能力。

sentences.sentence: Though the problem is particularly severe this year, it recurs across southern Africa.
sentences.translation: 尽管今年问题格外严重，但它在南部非洲反复出现。

structure.text: Though the problem is particularly severe this year
it recurs across southern Africa

difficult_points: Though 引导让步从句。
it 回指粮食危机，recurs 表示周期性重现。

sentences.sentence: Food is produced mainly by subsistence farmers on small plots with no irrigation, their fate tied to rain falling in the right amount at the right time.
sentences.translation: 粮食主要由没有灌溉设施的小块土地上的自给农民生产，他们的命运取决于雨量是否适中、降雨是否及时。

structure.text: Food is produced mainly by subsistence farmers on small plots with no irrigation
their fate tied to rain falling in the right amount at the right time

difficult_points: is produced 是被动语态，by 短语说明生产者。
their fate tied 是省略 being 的独立主格，falling 修饰 rain。

sentences.sentence: Bad roads and unreliable transport make it expensive to move food and seeds.
sentences.translation: 糟糕的道路和不可靠的运输使粮食与种子的运送成本高昂。

structure.text: Bad roads and unreliable transport make it expensive
to move food and seeds

difficult_points: make + it + adjective 构成形式宾语结构。
to move food and seeds 是真正宾语。

sentences.sentence: Without proper marketing channels, small farmers cannot sell whatever surplus they may have outside their neighbourhoods.
sentences.translation: 没有适当的销售渠道，小农户无法把可能拥有的任何余粮卖到社区之外。

structure.text: Without proper marketing channels
small farmers cannot sell
whatever surplus they may have outside their neighbourhoods

difficult_points: Without 短语表示缺少必要条件。
whatever 引导名词性从句，they may have 修饰 surplus。

sentences.sentence: This leaves southern Mozambicans hungry, even when crops are plentiful up north.
sentences.translation: 这使莫桑比克南部居民挨饿，即使北部粮食丰收也是如此。

structure.text: This leaves southern Mozambicans hungry
even when crops are plentiful up north

difficult_points: leave + object + adjective 中 hungry 是宾补。
This 回指粮食无法跨地区销售运输的问题。

sentences.sentence: Maize is ill-suited to the climate, needing too much water.
sentences.translation: 玉米不适合这种气候，因为它需要太多水。

structure.text: Maize is ill-suited to the climate
needing too much water

difficult_points: be ill-suited to 表示不适合。
needing 的逻辑主语是 Maize，补充说明原因。

sentences.sentence: In Malawi, there are too many people for the land.
sentences.translation: 在马拉维，人口数量超过了土地的承载能力。

structure.text: there are too many people
for the land

difficult_points: there are 是存现结构。
too many...for... 表示人口相对土地资源过多。

expressions.text: too many people for the land

sentences.sentence: Partly due to bad farming, yields are low.
sentences.translation: 部分由于耕作方式不佳，农作物产量很低。

structure.text: Partly due to bad farming
yields are low

difficult_points: due to 引出产量低的部分原因。
Partly 表明糟糕耕作并非唯一原因。

sentences.sentence: And the region has the world's highest rate of AIDS.
sentences.translation: 而且该地区的艾滋病感染率为全球最高。

structure.text: the region
has the world's highest rate of AIDS

difficult_points: And 承接前文，增加另一个长期问题。
the world's highest 是最高级，比较范围为全球。

sentences.sentence: Many small farmers struggle to make ends meet even in good years, so one bad season can be disastrous.
sentences.translation: 许多小农户即使在好年景也难以维持生计，因此一个歉收季就可能带来灾难。

structure.text: Many small farmers struggle to make ends meet even in good years
so one bad season can be disastrous

difficult_points: struggle to 表示艰难地设法做到。
so 连接长期脆弱处境与歉收带来的结果。

sentences.sentence: And in Swaziland and Mozambique, they are facing their fourth dry year in a row.
sentences.translation: 在斯威士兰和莫桑比克，农民正连续遭遇第四个干旱年。

structure.text: they
are facing their fourth dry year in a row

difficult_points: they 回指 small farmers。
in a row 表示连续发生而无间断。

sentences.sentence: Unable to grow enough to feed themselves or borrow their way out of hard times, farmers end up losing the few assets they have.
sentences.translation: 农民既种不出足够食物养活自己，也无法靠借贷渡过难关，最终失去仅有的资产。

structure.text: Unable to grow enough to feed themselves or borrow their way out of hard times
farmers end up losing the few assets they have

difficult_points: Unable 的逻辑主语是 farmers，句首短语说明原因。
they have 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 assets。

sentences.sentence: In Malawi, those without anything left often resort to cutting and selling firewood, further eroding the soil and making their plots still less productive, or else fishing already depleted waters.
sentences.translation: 在马拉维，一无所有的人常靠砍伐和出售木柴度日，这会进一步侵蚀土壤、降低土地生产力；否则就去已经枯竭的水域捕鱼。

structure.text: those without anything left often resort to cutting and selling firewood
further eroding the soil and making their plots still less productive
or else fishing already depleted waters

difficult_points: resort to 后接动名词 cutting、selling 和 fishing。
eroding 与 making 表示砍柴造成的进一步后果。

sentences.sentence: Others venture into crocodile-infested rivers to dig out water-lily tubers for food.
sentences.translation: 另一些人冒险进入鳄鱼出没的河流，挖取睡莲块茎充饥。

structure.text: Others venture into crocodile-infested rivers
to dig out water-lily tubers for food

difficult_points: crocodile-infested 是复合形容词，修饰 rivers。
to dig out 表示冒险进入河流的目的。

sentences.sentence: Bad government policy sometimes makes things worse.
sentences.translation: 糟糕的政府政策有时会使情况恶化。

structure.text: Bad government policy
sometimes makes things worse

difficult_points: make + things + worse 是宾语补足语结构。
sometimes 表明政府政策并非所有问题的唯一原因。

sentences.sentence: In Zimbabwe, once the region's breadbasket, land grabs have crippled commercial agriculture and irrigation systems.
sentences.translation: 津巴布韦曾是该地区的粮仓，但土地侵占已重创商业农业和灌溉系统。

structure.text: once the region's breadbasket
land grabs have crippled commercial agriculture and irrigation systems

difficult_points: once the region's breadbasket 与 Zimbabwe 同位，说明昔日地位。
have crippled 用现在完成时强调破坏后果延续至今。

sentences.sentence: Hyperinflation and lack of foreign exchange make it hard to buy seeds and fertiliser, while fuel shortages stymie crop transport.
sentences.translation: 恶性通胀和外汇短缺使人们难以购买种子与化肥，而燃料短缺又阻碍农作物运输。

structure.text: Hyperinflation and lack of foreign exchange make it hard to buy seeds and fertiliser
while fuel shortages stymie crop transport

difficult_points: make it hard to 是形式宾语结构。
while 表示同时存在的另一种阻碍，stymie 意为阻挠。

sentences.sentence: A recent operation to "clean up" cities by bulldozing supposedly illegal dwellings has left another 700,000 people destitute, adding to the ranks of the hungry.
sentences.translation: 最近一项以推平所谓非法住宅来“清理”城市的行动，又使70万人陷入赤贫，扩大了饥饿人口。

structure.text: A recent operation to "clean up" cities by bulldozing supposedly illegal dwellings has left another 700,000 people destitute
adding to the ranks of the hungry

difficult_points: leave + people + destitute 是宾补结构。
adding 表示行动造成的进一步结果。

sentences.sentence: The government has so far refused to endorse the UN's proposed emergency programme to help those affected.
sentences.translation: 政府迄今拒绝支持联合国提出的援助受灾者紧急计划。

structure.text: The government has so far refused to endorse the UN's proposed emergency programme
to help those affected

difficult_points: has refused 表示拒绝状态延续至今。
affected 是过去分词，后置修饰 those。

sentences.sentence: Other governments are less bloody-minded.
sentences.translation: 其他国家政府没有那么冷酷固执。

structure.text: Other governments
are less bloody-minded

difficult_points: less 构成比较级，与津巴布韦政府作隐含比较。
bloody-minded 表示冷酷而顽固。

sentences.sentence: Malawi, the worst-hit country, with 5 million people (nearly half its population) needing food handouts, wants help.
sentences.translation: 受灾最严重的马拉维需要援助；该国有500万人——接近总人口一半——需要食品救济。

structure.text: Malawi, the worst-hit country
with 5 million people (nearly half its population) needing food handouts
wants help

difficult_points: the worst-hit country 是 Malawi 的同位语。
with + people + needing 构成复合结构。

sentences.sentence: In July, President Bingu wa Mutharika asked his compatriots to give to a "feed the nation" fund: so far, $565,000 has been collected.
sentences.translation: 7月，总统宾古·瓦·穆塔里卡呼吁同胞向“养活全国”基金捐款；迄今已筹得56.5万美元。

structure.text: President Bingu wa Mutharika asked his compatriots to give to a "feed the nation" fund
so far, $565,000 has been collected

difficult_points: ask sb to do sth 表示要求或呼吁某人行动。
has been collected 是现在完成时被动。

sentences.sentence: In August, the UN appealed for $88 million.
sentences.translation: 8月，联合国呼吁筹集8800万美元。

structure.text: In August
the UN appealed for $88 million

difficult_points: 一般过去时对应明确时间 In August。
appeal for 表示公开呼吁提供资金。

sentences.sentence: The World Bank will give $30 million.
sentences.translation: 世界银行将提供3000万美元。

structure.text: The World Bank
will give $30 million

difficult_points: will 表示已宣布的未来资助。
give 的宾语为具体金额，接受方由语境补足。

sentences.sentence: Harnessing what the region already has would go a long way to offsetting its chronic hunger.
sentences.translation: 充分利用该地区已有资源，将大大有助于缓解长期饥饿。

structure.text: Harnessing what the region already has
would go a long way to offsetting its chronic hunger

difficult_points: Harnessing 是动名词作主语，what 引导其宾语从句。
go a long way to 中 to 是介词，后接动名词 offsetting。

sentences.sentence: In southern Malawi, rivers regularly flood - and are badly managed.
sentences.translation: 在马拉维南部，河流经常泛滥，而且管理不善。

structure.text: rivers regularly flood
and are badly managed

difficult_points: flood 与 are managed 是同一主语的并列谓语。
破折号突出“管理不善”这一人为问题。

sentences.sentence: By contrast, a big sugar plantation in Nchalo, its sprinklers spitting out arcs of water, is a green oasis.
sentences.translation: 相比之下，恩查洛一座大型甘蔗种植园的喷头喷出弧形水柱，整片园区宛如绿色绿洲。

structure.text: a big sugar plantation in Nchalo
its sprinklers spitting out arcs of water
is a green oasis

difficult_points: its sprinklers spitting 是独立主格结构。
By contrast 将灌溉良好的种植园与泛滥失管的河流对比。

sentences.sentence: On a smaller but no less hopeful scale, the nearby Chitsukwa irrigation scheme cost only about $20,000 and provided canals and enough low-tech pumps to water 18 hectares (45 acres), which sustain 176 farmers.
sentences.translation: 附近的奇楚夸灌溉项目规模较小却同样令人振奋，仅耗资约2万美元，修建了水渠和足以灌溉18公顷土地的简易水泵，供176名农民维生。

structure.text: the nearby Chitsukwa irrigation scheme cost only about $20,000 and provided canals and enough low-tech pumps
to water 18 hectares (45 acres)
which sustain 176 farmers

difficult_points: cost 与 provided 是并列谓语。
which 指代18公顷灌溉土地，说明其供养的农民数量。

sentences.sentence: Along the canal, women with babies on their backs labour on what look like portable stairmasters, pumping water into their fields: the maize is flourishing.
sentences.translation: 沿着水渠，背着婴儿的妇女在看似便携踏步机的装置上辛苦劳作，把水泵入田地；玉米长势喜人。

structure.text: women with babies on their backs labour on what look like portable stairmasters
pumping water into their fields
the maize is flourishing

difficult_points: what 引导介词 on 的宾语从句。
pumping 的逻辑主语是 women，冒号后说明灌溉成果。

sentences.sentence: Now armed with better knowledge, farmers are aiming at three crops a year, instead of the precarious single one to which they were accustomed.
sentences.translation: 如今掌握了更好的知识，农民计划一年种三季，而不再依赖过去习惯的、风险很高的一季收成。

structure.text: Now armed with better knowledge
farmers are aiming at three crops a year
instead of the precarious single one to which they were accustomed

difficult_points: armed with 是过去分词短语，逻辑主语为 farmers。
to which 中 to 来自 be accustomed to，which 指 single one。

sentences.sentence: A few kilometres down the road, the land is hopelessly dry and barren.
sentences.translation: 沿路几公里外，土地却干旱荒芜，毫无希望。

structure.text: A few kilometres down the road
the land is hopelessly dry and barren

difficult_points: down the road 表示沿路另一地点。
dry 与 barren 是并列表语，hopelessly 加强程度。

sentences.sentence: Uladi Mussa, Malawi s minister for agriculture and food security, insists that expanding small-scale irrigation is a top priority.
sentences.translation: 马拉维农业与粮食安全部长乌拉迪·穆萨坚持认为，扩大小规模灌溉是首要任务。

structure.text: Uladi Mussa, Malawi s minister for agriculture and food security, insists
that expanding small-scale irrigation is a top priority

difficult_points: 部长身份是 Uladi Mussa 的同位语，Malawi s 是源文所有格异常。
expanding 是动名词作 that 从句主语。

sentences.sentence: The potential is there, he explains, but Malawi lacks the know-how and money to do it on its own.
sentences.translation: 他解释说，潜力确实存在，但马拉维缺乏独力实施所需的技术和资金。

structure.text: The potential is there
he explains
but Malawi lacks the know-how and money to do it on its own

difficult_points: he explains 是插入式报道语。
it 回指扩大灌溉，on its own 表示不依赖外援。

sentences.sentence: Zambia and Mozambique have both welcomed exiled white Zimbabwean farmers, whose skills are already boosting local agriculture.
sentences.translation: 赞比亚和莫桑比克都接纳了流亡的津巴布韦白人农民，他们的技能已在促进当地农业发展。

structure.text: Zambia and Mozambique have both welcomed exiled white Zimbabwean farmers
whose skills are already boosting local agriculture

difficult_points: exiled 是过去分词形容词，修饰 farmers。
whose 指 farmers，说明其技能带来的影响。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, chronic hunger is threatening southern Africa's future generations.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，长期饥饿正威胁南部非洲的未来几代人。

structure.text: chronic hunger
is threatening southern Africa's future generations

difficult_points: is threatening 用进行时强调威胁正在发展。
future generations 指儿童及尚未出生的后代。

sentences.sentence: Close to half of Malawi's under-five-year-olds are stunted.
sentences.translation: 马拉维近一半的五岁以下儿童发育迟缓。

structure.text: Close to half of Malawi's under-five-year-olds
are stunted

difficult_points: under-five-year-olds 是名词化复合词，指五岁以下儿童。
stunted 表示因营养不良而生长发育受阻。

sentences.sentence: Schools unable to feed their pupils report drops in attendance, as children are too weak to walk or are forced to help their parents find food.
sentences.translation: 无力为学生供餐的学校报告出勤率下降，因为孩子们虚弱得无法步行，或被迫帮助父母寻找食物。

structure.text: Schools unable to feed their pupils report drops in attendance
as children are too weak to walk or are forced to help their parents find food

difficult_points: unable to feed their pupils 后置修饰 Schools。
too weak to 表示虚弱到无法做某事，are forced 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: For them, the damage will remain long after the rains have come.
sentences.translation: 对这些孩子而言，即使雨季到来很久以后，伤害仍将持续。

structure.text: For them
the damage will remain
long after the rains have come

difficult_points: them 回指受饥饿影响的儿童。
after 从句用现在完成时，强调雨水到来后影响仍持续很久。
